quick_skim.title: Scalable and Trustworthy Earth Observation Foundation Models
quick_skim.abstract: Foundation models (FMs) have transformed machine learning from isolated task-specific model development toward general-purpose models pretrained on broad data and adapted to multiple downstream tasks. Earth observation (EO) is an important domain for this paradigm because satellite and airborne archives are large, high-revisit, and increasingly multimodal, while reliable field labels are often sparse. Remote sensing foundation models (RSFMs) cannot be transferred reliably/optimally without domain-specific adaptation. This is because EO data are governed by measurement physics and operational decision constraints. This chapter reviews the design principles arising from these domain-specific constraints. It first defines the FMs paradigm in remote sensing (RS), then synthesizes the current model landscape, pretraining objectives, architecture designs, downstream adaptation and trustworthiness requirements. The chapter also incorporates recent benchmark evidence showing that no single geospatial foundation model is universally best and that inconsistent evaluation remains a major issue to fair comparison and reliable deployment. In addition, two brief environmental monitoring case studies; physics-informed spectral targeted masking for harmful algal bloom prediction and reinforcement learning for adaptive environmental monitoring station selection to illustrate the FMs domain-guided principles in practice. This chapter posits that next-generation RSFMs should be evaluated not only by benchmark accuracy, but also by modality-aware transfer and physically plausible representations for trustworthy EO decisions.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: reviews RS foundation models for multimodal EO

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Reviews design principles for remote sensing foundation models, addressing multimodal data and domain-specific adaptation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文综述了遥感基础模型的设计原则，指出地球观测数据具有多模态、高重访等特点，需要领域自适应才能可靠迁移。文章首先定义遥感基础模型范式，然后从测量物理和决策约束角度分析设计原则，为多模态遥感数据融合和模型泛化提供理论基础。

quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 多模态遥感图像分类与缺失模态学习相关文献检索, especially work that connects or combines: m; i; studies addressing learning methods with missing modalities in remote sensing data; methods for fusing multimodal remote sensing data from different sensors; find academic papers on multimodal remote sensing image classification and missing modality learning; retrieve studies about multimodal remote sensing data fusion and incomplete modality processing; explore deep learning approaches for handling missing modalities in multimodal remote sensing images.

quick_skim.title: Learning Speaker Identity Beyond Language and Modality Constraints: Insights from the POLY-SIM 2026 Challenge
quick_skim.abstract: Multimodal speaker identification systems typically assume the availability of complete and homogeneous audio-visual modalities during both training and testing, and assume each speaker only speaks a single language. However, in real-world applications, such assumptions often do not hold. Visual or audio information may be missing due to occlusions, camera or microphone failures, or privacy constraints. Multilingual speakers introduce additional complexity due to linguistic variability across languages. These situations constitute substantial challenges for the robustness and generalization capabilities of multimodal speaker identification systems. Aim of the POLY-SIM 2026 challenge is to address these aspects of speaker identification and to provide a standardized setup for the comparison of the proposed solutions.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: handles missing audio or visual modalities in speaker ID
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 处理说话人识别中音频或视觉模态缺失
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 处理说话人识别中音频或视觉模态缺失
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 处理说话人识别中音频或视觉模态缺失
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Addresses missing modalities in multimodal speaker identification, proposing challenge for robust learning across modality availability.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文聚焦多模态说话人识别中音频或视觉模态缺失以及多语言变化的实际问题，通过POLY-SIM挑战赛推动鲁棒性研究。方法虽针对说话人识别，但其处理缺失模态的思路（如缺失下的自适应融合）可迁移至遥感多模态学习。

quick_skim.title: M3F-UAV: A Missing-Modality Multimodal Foundation Model for Low-Altitude Wireless Sensing
quick_skim.abstract: Low-altitude unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are emerging as key platforms for wireless intelligence tasks. However, practical low-altitude wireless systems usually operate in complex urban environments, where visual occlusion, sparse geometric observations, multipath propagation, and sensor failures may degrade the reliability of single-modality models. To address these challenges, this paper proposes M3F-UAV, a missing-modality multimodal foundation model for low-altitude wireless sensing. The proposed framework learns a unified multimodal representation from visual, geometric, and wireless observations. Specifically, modality-specific pretrained feature extractors are adopted for RGB/depth images, LiDAR point clouds, and CSI matrices, respectively. Through cross-modal fusion and missing-modality-aware pretraining with feature-level masked reconstruction and UAV localization objectives, M3F-UAV can extract fixed-size features from different modality combinations and adapt them to downstream low-altitude wireless tasks with lightweight task heads. Experiments on the LAMBDA dataset show that M3F-UAV outperforms single-modality baselines and maintains robust performance under missing-modality settings.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: proposes missing-modality multimodal foundation model applicable to UAV-based remote sensing scenarios
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出缺失模态多模态基础模型，可应用于无人机遥感场景
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出缺失模态多模态基础模型，可应用于无人机遥感场景
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出缺失模态多模态基础模型，可应用于无人机遥感场景
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: M3F-UAV learns unified multimodal representation from RGB/depth, LiDAR, and CSI for low-altitude wireless sensing, handling missing modalities via modality-specific pretrained extractors and fusion.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 低空无人机在复杂环境中常面临传感器缺失或遮挡问题。本文提出M3F-UAV，一种面向缺失模态的多模态基础模型，利用视觉、几何和无线信号的预训练特征提取器，学习统一表示以应对模态缺失。在多个感知任务上验证了其在缺失模态下的鲁棒性。虽然当前面向无线感知，但方法可迁移至遥感多模态分析与缺失模态学习。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 低空无人机在复杂环境中常面临传感器缺失或遮挡问题。本文提出M3F-UAV，一种面向缺失模态的多模态基础模型，利用视觉、几何和无线信号的预训练特征提取器，学习统一表示以应对模态缺失。在多个感知任务上验证了其在缺失模态下的鲁棒性。虽然当前面向无线感知，但方法可迁移至遥感多模态分析与缺失模态学习。
